steps.title: Identify the total
steps.content: The second sentence says the 1991 parade was one of many military-related ticker-tape parades. The next sentence gives the overall count of such parades between 1886 and 2022.

steps.title: Use a summary transition
steps.content: A would imply a result, B would restate the previous sentence, and C would signal contrast. The transition needs to introduce a summarizing total that wraps up the example. The answer is D.
